properties.description: Opens the Glass Door, when set to 1. Closes it, when set to 0.
Locks the Glass Door, when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Turns the Glass Door on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
When set to 0 console on the door opens/closes door. When set to 1 console sets/resets Setting but does not affect door.
Desired state, mostly usefull for Logic based control when Mode is 1.
Returns whether the Glass Door is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current amount of power, required by the Glass Door, in watts.
